CONTENT.Club career: Kemlein is a product of the youth academy of SC Berliner and Union Berlin. On 1 September 2022, he signed his first professional contract with Union Berlin. He made his senior and professional debut with Union Berlin as a late substitute in a 4–1 Bundesliga win over Mainz on 20 August 2023.On 7 January 2024, Union Berlin sent Kemlein on loan to 2. Bundesliga club FC St. Pauli until the end of the season.
CONTENT.External links: Aljoscha Kemlein at SoccerwayAljoscha Kemlein at DFB (also available in German)Aljoscha Kemlein at BDFutbol
CONTENT.International career: Kemlein is a youth international for Germany, having played up to the Germany U19s.

SUMMARY: Aljoscha Kemlein (born 2 August 2004) is a German professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Bundesliga club Union Berlin.
